exposure_events.label: Cabin 406 — Shared Accommodation
exposure_events.notes: Married couple sharing a 12 m² cabin for the full voyage. Continuous shared-air exposure. Index case (PEDB43) onset approximately April 6; husband (P002) onset April 8. Highest-risk exposure category.

exposure_events.label: Medical Assistance — Cabin 406 / Medical Bay
exposure_events.location: MV Hondius · Deck 4, Cabin 406 and Medical Bay
exposure_events.notes: British crew member (P003) provided repeated close-contact care to symptomatic index case (PEDB43) without adequate PPE before shipboard physician was aware of severity. Onset 9 days post-exposure — within expected 7–14 day hantavirus incubation window.

exposure_events.label: Crew Deck 2 — Shared Workspace & Ventilation
exposure_events.location: MV Hondius · Deck 2, Crew Quarters / Engine Room
exposure_events.notes: Dutch crew member (P004) shared enclosed lower-deck workspaces and ventilation zones with P003 during P003's prodromal phase. P004 onset April 18 — 6 days after shared-workspace exposure began. Serology pending.
